prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 only as the cinematic desktop-wallpaper inspiration, replace the beachside Venice street scene with a new everyday travel scene in Japan. Create a wide 16:9, ultra-detailed 4K wallpaper showing Mount Fuji dominating the background, with a Japanese commuter train crossing a bridge in the foreground during warm golden-hour sunset. Include exactly 3 visible connected train cars on 1 long bridge, with a riverbed below, wooded hills to the left, distant towns and layered mountains at the base of the landmark, and a clean blue sky with a few softly lit clouds. Preserve the reference’s realistic travel-photography feel, warm cinematic lighting, natural color grading, sharp detail, and wallpaper-friendly composition, but do not keep the original palm trees, ocean beach, shops, cars, road, or signage. No text, no logos, no people as main subjects, no watermark.
